questions.question: What Asian nation was not invaded by enemy forces between 1275 and 1944?
Who has starred in movies by Francis Ford Coppola, Brian DePalma, Sergio Leone and Martin Scorsese?
Whose court battle with the beef industry did Time dub "The Thrilla in Amarilla"?
What German nerve specialist was the first to diagnose Alzheimer's disease, in 1907?
What breakfast item did Burger King reformulate in 1996, making it less likely to leave grease stains on steering wheels?
Whose works are covered in an introductory college course dubbed "Baby Shakes"?
